_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the per-domain source files; CI regenerates this file.

content.markdown:
# Error state

Error states communicate that something failed or a resource could not be loaded. Copy must be specific, non-blaming, and give users a path forward.

***

## When to use

* When a page, component, or resource fails to load.

* When a user action fails to complete.

## Style

* Be specific about what failed where possible.

* Offer a resolution step or next action.

* Do not use technical error codes as the primary message.

* Do not blame the user.

## Do / Don't

| Do                                                                            | Don't                         |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- |
| Something went wrong / Try again or contact support if the problem continues. | Error 500.                    |
| We couldn't load your datasets. / Refresh the page or try again later.        | An unexpected error occurred. |

## Examples

| Element     | Example text                                                                                  |
| ----------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Title       | Something went wrong                                                                          |
| Body        | There was an error creating your item. Try again or contact support if the problem continues. |
| Primary CTA | Try again                                                                                     |

content.prose: Error states communicate that something failed or a resource could not be loaded. Copy must be specific, non-blaming, and give users a path forward.

bullets: When a page, component, or resource fails to load.
When a user action fails to complete.
Be specific about what failed where possible.
Offer a resolution step or next action.
Do not use technical error codes as the primary message.

content.do: Something went wrong / Try again or contact support if the problem continues.
We couldn't load your datasets. / Refresh the page or try again later.

rows: There was an error creating your item. Try again or contact support if the problem continues.

content.prose: System states communicate the current condition of the platform or a specific view. Clear, direct copy helps users understand what happened and what to do next.
